name: CALERES INC
business: Caleres, Inc. is a global footwear company that operates retail shoe stores and e-commerce websites, and designs, develops, sources, manufactures and distributes footwear for people of all ages. Its operations are organized into two reportable segments: Famous Footwear (family-branded footwear retail) and Brand Portfolio (wholesale and direct-to-consumer branded footwear). It sells branded footwear including Nike, Skechers, adidas, and its own brands such as Sam Edelman, Naturalizer, Allen Edmonds, and Stuart Weitzman.
sellsTo: Consumers via retail stores and e-commerce

exposures.sentence: Famous Footwear employs an omni-channel approach to reach consumers wherever they want to shop, including our e-commerce channel through famousfootwear.com and famousfootwear.ca, as well as 821 Famous Footwear retail store locations.

Caleres, Inc. (the "Company"), originally founded as Brown Shoe Company in 1878 and incorporated in 1913, is a global footwear company that operates retail shoe stores and e-commerce websites, and designs, develops, sources, manufactures and distributes footwear for people of all ages.

We may be unable to quickly adapt to rapid change resulting from artificial intelligence and other machine learning technologies that may result in changes to our supply chain, distribution channels, and point-of-sale capabilities.

catalysts.event: Open approximately 15 retail store locations and close approximately 25 in 2026 (Famous Footwear)
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate that we will open approximately 15 retail store locations and close approximately 25 in 2026.

catalysts.event: Open approximately 2 new Allen Edmonds stores and close approximately 5 stores in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to open approximately two new Allen Edmonds stores and close approximately five stores in 2026, as we continue to align our real estate and e-commerce strategies.

catalysts.event: Open approximately 2 net new Sam Edelman stores and 5 net new franchisee stores in East and Southeast Asia in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate expanding our Sam Edelman presence in East and Southeast Asia in 2026 with the opening of approximately 2 net new stores, and 5 net new franchisee stores in 2026.

catalysts.event: Publish responsible business report in spring 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect to publish another responsible business report in the spring of 2026.
